calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Successor Trustee'S First Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA"), Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel for an update. Ms. Mannion reports that the real property had been damaged in a fire and had since been boarded-up. The SFPA is currently accepting bids to clear-out the home and will likely be a costly expense. Ms. Mannion reports that the SFPA has secured home insurance, however, it appears as though the homeowner's policy had lapsed during COVID so the damage to the home caused by the fire may not be covered. Ms. Mannion advises that the SFPA will continue to investigate what attempts were made by the insurance company to contact the decedent regarding late insurance payment prior to cancelling the policy. Ms. Mannion also reports that the SFPA has been able to collect on one (1) of two (2) known accounts that the decedent had but that it appears as though the real property is the main asset of the trust. The court then confirms with counsel that there is no mortgage due on the real property. The court advises Ms. Mannion that it is considering taking the trust under supervision for one (1) year. Ms. Mannion does not object.

The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
